summary: Completed Phase A testing: STRICT Live-Search-Only Research Engine. Backend APIs working correctly (94.1% success rate). Frontend login flow has critical issue preventing full UI testing. Core research pipeline verified: Exa gracefully skipped, Tavily fallback working, no_data handling correct, cache behavior correct, all regression APIs functional.

minor_issues.issue: Requires at least 2 products in request body, but test only had 1 product from MCB query
minor_issues.impact: Test failure only - not a bug, just insufficient test data

notes: Research for 'EV Connector' returned no_data - this is CORRECT behavior (system refusing to fabricate data when no verified live sources found)

All core APIs tested and working: /api/health, /api/auth/login, /api/research, /api/admin/api-keys/status, /api/dashboard/summary, /api/bom/generate, /api/chat, /api/favorites, /api/documents, /api/products, /api/brands

critical_bugs.issue: Login API call failing with net::ERR_ABORTED - form submission not completing
critical_bugs.impact: BLOCKS all frontend testing - cannot authenticate to test protected pages
critical_bugs.details: Backend /api/auth/login works correctly (verified in backend tests), but frontend login form submission is being aborted. Console shows: 'REQUEST FAILED: https://engineering-ai-3.preview.emergentagent.com/api/auth/login - net::ERR_ABORTED'. Possible causes: CORS issue, timing issue, or frontend bug in form submission handler.

integration_issues.issue: Cannot complete login flow to test authenticated pages

untested_features: AI Search page with real component query (data-testid='ai-search-input' not accessible due to login failure)
AI Search page with nonsense query (no-data state)
Product detail panel with source URLs

passed_tests: ✅ Backend: Health Check - Exa=False, Tavily=True, Firecrawl=True, LLM=True (correct configuration)
✅ Backend: Login API - owner@efuelhub.com authentication successful
✅ Backend: Research MCB - live_search mode, tavily provider, 1 product with source_urls
✅ Backend: Research Solar Inverter - live_search mode, tavily provider, 2 products with source_urls
✅ Backend: Research Nonsense Query - correctly returned no_data=true, exact message match
✅ Backend: Cache Test MCCB - cache hit detected (0.14s response)
✅ Backend: Admin API Keys Status - all providers have required fields (exa/tavily/firecrawl/emergent_llm)
✅ Backend: Dashboard Summary - api_status includes exa_search key
✅ Frontend: Page navigation to all routes successful (Compare, BOM, Chat, Documents, Favorites, Component Library, Admin)
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix frontend login flow - login API call is being aborted (net::ERR_ABORTED). Backend /api/auth/login works correctly, but frontend form submission fails. Investigate: 1) CORS configuration, 2) Form submission handler in Login.js, 3) AuthContext login function, 4) API client configuration. Once login is fixed, re-run frontend tests to verify: AI Search page (real/nonsense queries), Dashboard API status display, Live Verified Data badges, product source URLs display, and all authenticated page functionality.

success_percentage.frontend: 14.3% (1/7 tests passed - only unauthenticated page navigation tested)

strict_live_search_requirements.exa_not_configured: ✅ VERIFIED - Exa correctly returns False in /api/health
strict_live_search_requirements.tavily_fallback_working: ✅ VERIFIED - All research queries used 'tavily' as search_provider_used
strict_live_search_requirements.exact_no_data_message: ✅ VERIFIED - Message exactly matches: 'No verified live manufacturer data was found for this product. Please check your search query or configure Exa/Tavily and Firecrawl API keys.'
strict_live_search_requirements.products_have_source_urls: ✅ VERIFIED - All returned products have non-empty source_urls arrays
strict_live_search_requirements.last_crawl_time_populated: ✅ VERIFIED - Successful queries have last_crawl_time ISO timestamp
strict_live_search_requirements.no_data_not_cached: ✅ VERIFIED - Cache only stores successful live_search results, not no_data results
strict_live_search_requirements.cache_hit_performance: ✅ VERIFIED - Cached results return in <1 second (0.14s observed)

admin_api_verification.api_keys_status_fields: ✅ VERIFIED - All providers (exa/tavily/firecrawl/emergent_llm) have required fields: configured, enabled, source, usage_count, last_success_at
admin_api_verification.dashboard_api_status: ✅ VERIFIED - Dashboard summary includes api_status with keys: exa_search, tavily_search, firecrawl_extract, ai_analysis

regression_verification.compare_api: ⚠️ MINOR ISSUE - Requires 2+ products (validation error with 1 product)
